inputs.name: YawRate_degps
inputs.description: Measured vehicle yaw rate from gyroscope

inputs.name: SteeringAngle_deg
inputs.description: Steering wheel angle from steering angle sensor

inputs.name: VehicleSpeed_mps
inputs.description: Longitudinal vehicle speed from wheel speed sensors

inputs.name: SpeedDeratingBP_mps
inputs.description: Breakpoint vector (vehicle speed in m/s) for the intervention authority derating lookup table (REQ-SCS-007)

inputs.name: SpeedDeratingTable
inputs.description: Table values (derating factor 0-1) for the intervention authority derating lookup table (REQ-SCS-007)

outputs.name: BrakeTorque_FL_Nm
outputs.description: Commanded brake torque for front-left wheel

outputs.name: BrakeTorque_FR_Nm
outputs.description: Commanded brake torque for front-right wheel

outputs.name: BrakeTorque_RL_Nm
outputs.description: Commanded brake torque for rear-left wheel

outputs.name: BrakeTorque_RR_Nm
outputs.description: Commanded brake torque for rear-right wheel

outputs.name: SCS_Active
outputs.description: Flag indicating stability control is actively intervening

outputs.name: YawRateError_degps
outputs.description: Computed yaw rate error (measured minus reference)

outputs.name: DeratingFactor
outputs.description: Current speed-dependent intervention authority derating factor (0-1), where 1.0 = full authority (REQ-SCS-007)
